title: Set up Trigger.dev v3 for background jobs and scheduled tasks
summary: Install Trigger.dev v3, define tasks, configure the CLI dev mode for local development, trigger jobs from Next.js, and deploy to production.
declaration: I will set up Trigger.dev v3 (latest) for durable background jobs, scheduled tasks, and retry-safe workflows. Trigger.dev v3 runs tasks outside your Next.js server in a persistent execution environment. If you need Inngest instead, say so before I begin.
